s1.ptxt: Connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC.
Erase DTC and pending DTC according to instructions displayed on scan tool. Refer to scan tool operator’s manual for further details.
If communication between scan tool and TCM is not possible, go to CAN Communication Check .
After completing clearance, set ignition OFF and disconnect SUZUKI scan tool from DLC.

attention3.ptxt: Pending and confirmed DTC and freeze frame data stored in TCM memory are also cleared in the following cases. Be careful not to clear them before recording them.

item.ptxt: When the same malfunction (DTC) is not detected again during 40 engine warm-up cycles.
Even though the pending and confirmed DTCs are cleared, the permanent DTC will not be cleared.
